allow: Bash(python scripts/search.py "premium car wash service luxury glossy warm" --design-system -p "Cream Wash")
Bash(python scripts/search.py "glossy glassmorphism luxury premium" --domain style)
Bash(python scripts/search.py "luxury premium warm gold amber" --domain color)

hooks.command: bash -c "input=$(cat); echo \"$input\" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-rf|reset\s+--hard|terraform\s+apply|drop\s+table|drop\s+database|force\s+push|push\s+--force|truncate\s+table)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive operation detected. Please confirm this action with the user before proceeding.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0"
bash -c "input=$(cat); echo \"$input\" | grep -qiE 'git push.*(main|master)($|\s)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Direct push to main/master. Use a feature branch + PR.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0"

bash -c "input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo \"$input\" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo \"$cmd\" | grep -qiE '(kubectl apply|microk8s kubectl apply|helm (upgrade|install|uninstall)|terraform apply|argocd app sync|kustomize apply)' && ! echo \"$cmd\" | grep -q 'homelab-infra'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Homelab infrastructure changes must be staged in C:/Users/ltmas/Repo/homelab-infra first. Make the change there, commit it, then apply from that repo.' >&2 && exit 2; fi; exit 0"

bash -c "input=$(cat); echo \"$input\" | grep -qiE '(sk_live_|sk_test_|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|glpat-|-----BEGIN.*PRIVATE KEY|mongodb(\\+srv)?://[^@]+@|postgres(ql)?://[^@]+@|redis://:[^@]+@|eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\\.eyJ)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Potential secret/credential detected in content. Move secrets to Vault or Secrets Manager.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0"

bash -c "LOG=\"$HOME/.claude/audit.log\"; echo \"[$(date -Iseconds)] Tool: $CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME | Exit: $CLAUDE_TOOL_EXIT_CODE\" >> \"$LOG\"; if [ $(wc -l < \"$LOG\" 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -gt 5000 ]; then tail -3000 \"$LOG\" > \"$LOG.tmp\" && mv \"$LOG.tmp\" \"$LOG\"; fi"

bash -c "VAULT='C:/Users/ltmas/Documents/Obsidian Vault'; SESSION_DATE=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); SESSION_DIR=\"$VAULT/Sessions/$(date +%Y)/$(date +%m)\"; mkdir -p \"$SESSION_DIR\"; echo \"[$(date -Iseconds)] $CLAUDE_TOOL_NAME: $(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | head -c 200)\" >> \"$SESSION_DIR/.session-activity-${SESSION_DATE}.log\"; exit 0"

bash -c "if echo \"$CLAUDE_NOTIFICATION\" | grep -qiE '(session|goodbye|closing|done for today|wrapping up)'; then echo 'REMINDER: Run /vault-session-end to write session summary to Obsidian vault.' >&2; fi; exit 0"
